caption: The video captures the interior of a grand hall with a large, circular wooden ceiling feature and a ring of bright lights. The room is characterized by tall, dark vertical pillars interspersed with large, illuminated stained-glass windows depicting figures. As the camera tilts downward, the view transitions from the ceiling to the lower section of the room. In the bottom half of the space, a large group of people is gathered, mostly dressed in dark formal attire. They are standing in tiered rows, forming a choir or ensemble. The scene shifts from a focus on the architectural details of the upper walls and ceiling to a wider shot that reveals the scale of the crowd and the ornate interior of the venue. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
